name: io.github.bikker/screenshotink-mcp
description: Screenshot, compare, audit and monitor any web page. Five tools for AI agents — take_screenshot, bulk_screenshots, compare_screenshots, run_lighthouse, capture_sitemap — backed by ScreenshotInk's hosted Chromium fleet. The captured image comes back inline so the agent can reason about the rendered pixels in the same turn. Free tier: 100 captures/month, no card.

environmentVariables.name: SCREENSHOTINK_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your ScreenshotInk API key (sk_live_…). Free at https://screenshotink.com/signup.
